question:
Over $1.2B committed to the MegaETH public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if total commitments for the MegaETH raise on Sonar exceeds $1.2B before the raise closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the official raise page available at https://token.megaeth.com/

If the final commitment amount cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: Echo.xyz Transformed Crypto Fundraising in 18 Months, Earning a $375M Coinbase Exit
evidences.content: Product milestones demonstrate exceptional execution. Platform statistics show over $200 million facilitated across 300+ completed deals since March 2024 launch—achieving this scale in just 18 months. Assets under management exceeded $100M by April 2025. MegaETH's December 2024 fundraise set records with $10M total raised split into rounds of $4.2M in 56 seconds and $5.8M in 75 seconds, validating platform liquidity and investor demand. Plasma's June 2025 XPL token sale using Sonar infrastructure demonstrated public sale product-market fit, selling 10% of supply at $500M fully diluted valuation with support for multiple stablecoins (USDT/USDC/USDS/DAI). [...] Ecosystem projects span leading crypto protocols. The 30+ projects that raised on Echo include: Ethena (synthetic dollar), Monad (high-performance L1), MegaETH (raised $10M in December 2024), Usual Money (stablecoin protocol), Morph (L2 solution), Hyperlane (interoperability), Initia (modular blockchain), Fuel, Solayer, Dawn, Derive, Sphere, OneBalance, Wildcat, and Hoptrail (first UK company to raise on Echo at $5.85M valuation). evidences.title: How to Join MegaETH Public Sale? - Whales Market
evidences.content: 1. Visit the Registration Page: Go to token.megaeth.com. 2. Connect Your Wallet: Click "Connect Wallet" and select MetaMask or your EVM-compatible wallet. 3. Connect to Sonar (Echo): Click "Connect Sonar" and sign up at app.echo.xyz. Complete KYC by uploading your passport/ID, a utility bill, and a selfie. Verification may take minutes to hours. 4. Link Social Accounts and Additional Wallets: Connect X (Twitter), Discord, and GitHub to boost your allocation score. You can link up to three on-chain wallets to prove activity. 5. Wait for the Sale: On October 27, 2025, at 1:00 PM UTC, return to the site, select your bid amount (between $2,650 and $186,282 in USDT), and choose the 1-year lockup option if desired for a 10% discount. [...] If oversubscribed, a U-Shaped Allocation model applies: It ensures wide distribution (at least 5,000 participants get the minimum $2,650 allocation) while deeper rewards go to core supporters based on on-chain activity, NFT holdings (e.g., Fluffle), social engagement (X, Discord), and GitHub contributions. This limits whale influence and favors committed community members. MegaETH Public Sale ### Timeline Registration is open now through October 27,...

evidences.title: The MegaETH Public Sale: A Reminder to Stand on Business
evidences.content: Published: 10/22/2025 [...] Loading post... Now, as we enter mainnet, a public sale is being launched with Sonar to create space for users (and potential users) who also want to be investors in $MEGA. This public sale will make non-insider investors the single largest stakeholder in the MegaETH network, larger than the VCs and the team. The real community for MegaETH is its $MEGA investor community, many of whom will be active users and ecosystem supporters. This non-consensus sale will help identify those who believe in our non-consensus blockchain. ## Why this Public Sale on Sonar is Unique Firstly, you choose a valuation you believe is compelling. A ceiling valuation will be set at $999M, mostly because auction systems can run rampant and retail shouldn't be forced to enter at unicorn valuations. [...] Public Sale Details Depth (Contributor Priority). Prioritized fills go to participants who've already contributed towards the development or growth of MegaETH and/or Ethereum. Breadth (Community Floor). Majority of users receive smaller fills to maximize unique holders and true community distribution. What counts as contribution (public signals that can be verified):

evidences.content: In June 2024, MegaETH announced the completion of a $20 million seed funding round led by Dragonfly. Other participants included Figment Capital, Robot Ventures, Big Brain Holdings, and angel investors such as Vitalik Buterin, Joseph Lubin (Founder and CEO of ConsenSys), Sreeram Kannan (Founder and CEO of EigenLayer), Kartik Talwar (Co-founder of ETHGlobal), Mert Mumtaz (Co-founder and CEO of Helius Labs), Hasu, and Jordan Fish (also known as Cobie). As of December 2024, MegaETH raised $10 million in less than three minutes through Cobie's Echo platform, far exceeding its initial target of $4.2 million. This round attracted approximately 3,200 investors from 94 countries, with an average funding amount per investor of $3,140. [...] From Vitalik's early participation in the seed funding round, to the rapid fundraising within the Echo community, and then to this year's NFT sale, every step of MegaETH’s journey has captured market attention. evidences.title: MegaETH Public Sale Coming Soon, What Will the Valuation Be?
evidences.content: In June 2024, MegaETH announced the completion of a $20 million seed round funding, led by Dragonfly with participation from Figment Capital, Robot Ventures, Big Brain Holdings, among others. Angel investors included Vitalik Buterin, ConsenSys founder and CEO Joseph Lubin, EigenLayer founder and CEO Sreeram Kannan, ETHGlobal co-founder Kartik Talwar, Helius Labs co-founder and CEO Mert Mumtaz, Hasu, and Jordan Fish (aka Cobie). Fast forward to December 2024, MegaETH raised $10 million in under three minutes through Cobie's Echo platform, far exceeding the target of $4.2 million. This funding round attracted around 3,200 investors from 94 countries, with an average investment amount of $3,140 per investor. [...] Now, this project, backed by Vitalik Buterin, is about to kick off its public sale on the Sonar platform. Is this a rare entry opportunity for ordinary investors, or is it the final blow of accumulated risk? This article will dissect the funding context, valuation logic, core value, and potential risks. # MegaETH Funding Journey: From VC, Vitalik Endorsement to Community Building As an Ethereum L2 project committed to achieving "real-time blockchain," MegaETH's funding jo...

evidences.content: Published: 10/22/2025 [...] The second component of the MegaETH public sale comes into play if there is an oversubscription at the clearing price. On mainnet, we will have additional tokens up for grabs by those who attempted to participate in the Sonar, Echo and Fluffle sales. ## Allocation Method for Oversubscribed Sales If the sale is oversubscribed at the clearing price, a U-Shaped Allocation system will be used to prioritize broad distribution while rewarding key contributors. The U-Shaped Allocation process ensures broad token distribution while prioritizing key contributors. MegaETH and Ethereum core supporters receive priority allocations, while at least 5,000 participants receive baseline allocations starting at $2,650. Public Sale Details

evidences.title: Vitalik Buterin backs new Ethereum-compatible chain MegaETH in $20M round
evidences.content: MegaETH, developed as a Layer 2 solution on Ethereum, reports transaction processing speeds of up to 100,000 transactions per second (TPS) with millisecond latency. Da Bing, founder of MegaETH, announced the funding round on Twitter. Institutional investors include Dragonfly Capital, Figment Capital, Robot Ventures, Folius Ventures, Tangent, Big Brain VC, and Credibly Neutral. Other individual investors, termed “Mega Angels” by the team, include Joseph Lubin, Sreeran Kannan, Cobie, Santiago Roel, Kartik Talwar, Hasu, and Mert Mumtaz. MegaETH reports having a functional devnet and is working towards further development. The project utilizes in-memory computing, state synchronization, and a new state trie design to achieve its reported performance.

evidences.title: From Retail Frenzy to Selective Capital: The Evolution of Public Token Sales
evidences.content: ## Launchpad Leaders: Where Capital Has Been Concentrated While the number of public sales provides a broad view of market activity, fundraising platforms reveal where capital has actually been concentrated throughout the cycle. CoinList remains the largest public sale platform by total disclosed capital raised, having facilitated approximately $1.37B across 80 projects. Despite launching significantly fewer projects than many competitors, CoinList continues to attract some of the industry's largest fundraising rounds. The second position is occupied by Fjord Foundry, which has raised nearly $975M through 202 projects, highlighting the growing role of IDO-focused platforms in the current market structure. Tokensoft follows with approximately $788M raised across 34 projects. [...] ## Annual Cycle The year 2021 remains the defining phase of the cycle. Public token sales raised approximately $2.77 billion throughout the year, while the number of sales reached 1,796. More importantly, this period marked a structural shift in fundraising dynamics. IDOs accounted for 83.7% of all public rounds by type, effectively replacing the earlier market structure in which ICOs and IEOs occupied...

DropsTab x Drops Bot -- Listen Share MegaETH’s Token Sale on Sonar Ethereum’s next big test for speed and fairness is about to go live. MegaETH, the real-time Layer-2 backed by Vitalik Buterin and Dragonfly Capital, is launching its public token sale on Cobie’s Sonar platform — a moment that could define how performance and access coexist in the next generation of Ethereum scaling. MegaETH investors ## A New Kind of Public Sale [...] MegaETH investors ## A New Kind of Public Sale Sonar is the brainchild of Jordan Fish (Cobie), built as a public-facing extension of Echo, his curated launch platform. Echo has already raised $100M across 30+ projects, known for fast rounds and transparent distribution. Sonar flips that model: it opens the door to verified users everywhere while letting founders control pricing, lockups, and allocation rules. The system relies on English auctions with capped ceilings...

evidences.title: Echo - MarketsWiki, A Commonwealth of Market Knowledge
evidences.content: In May 2025, Echo launched its flagship product, “Sonar,” expanding beyond invite-only investment groups into a self-hosted public token sale framework. This feature enabled project founders to conduct public fundraising campaigns directly on supported networks such as Solana, Base"), and Cardano, while remaining compliant with relevant securities laws in the jurisdictions in which they operated. The platform’s group investment structure allowed verified “lead investors” to pool contributions from participants while maintaining on-chain transparency. Echo’s model aimed to shift the concentration of power away from centralized venture funds, enabling smaller investors to co-invest on equal terms through smart contracts that automate transactions and reward structures. [...] Echo’s platform allows founders, retail participants, and accredited investors to collaborate on early-stage funding rounds through community-led investment groups managed entirely on the blockchain. The firm’s fundraising tools include “Sonar,” a software product launched in 2025 allowing founders to host their own public token sales on preferred blockchains such as Hyperliquid, Base, Solana or Cardano. Withi...

evidences.title: Coinbase acquires Echo: Unlocking the future of onchain capital ...
evidences.content: By Shan Aggarwal , Aklil Ibssa Oct 21, 2025 • 3min read _TL;DR Coinbase has acquired Echo, the leading onchain capital raising platform, for approximately $375M . Echo’s platform makes raising and investing more accessible to community members, either through a private Echo sale or a public sale that uses Sonar. By joining forces, we’re making it easier for companies to raise funds and grow, and giving the community early access to unique investment opportunities._ Image 7: espresso_hero_still_1920x1080.png [...] Echo solves this by allowing projects to raise directly from their community, either through a private sale or by self-hosting a public token sale using Sonar. Integrating Echo’s tools will help us enable more direct community participation, joining projects with capital, entirely onchain. While we’ll start with crypto token sales via Sonar, we plan to expand support to tokenized securities and real-world assets over time, leveraging Echo’s infrastructure. Echo has already made strides in opening up private markets helping projects raise $200M+ over ~300 completed deals since launch. Its new self-hosted public token sale product Sonar has also seen early success, helpin...

evidences.title: MegaETH ($MEGA) ICO on Sonar Launchpad | Participation Guide
evidences.content: MegaETH planned a token sale on Sonar with a stated raise target of $50,000,000 and minimum buy of $2,650. To participate, users needed to complete identity verification (KYC) on the Sonar platform before October 27, 2025. MegaETH employees and users from prohibited jurisdictions were not eligible, and U.S. participants faced additional accreditation requirements. The guide also advised providing extra profile information such as social media accounts, GitHub, or additional wallets before submitting a bid.
